_comment: Shared, character-independent expression vocabulary. Keys are the emoji allow-list exposed by set_expression(). Each entry maps an emoji to prompt fragments appended to a preset's base positive/negative prompts, plus an optional 'denoise' override. A preset may override any field via its own 'expression_overrides'. CLIP cannot read emoji, so this mapping to natural language is what actually reaches the sampler.
_denoise_note: Denoise is tuned to how much the reference image's geometry has to change to render the expression, not to how emotionally 'intense' it is. Closed-mouth, subtle-muscle expressions (neutral, content, smirk) get the lowest denoise so identity stays locked. Anything that opens the mouth or widens the eyes (surprised, shocked, sobbing) needs a higher budget. Emoji that introduce features not present in the reference face at all - cat ears/whiskers, sunglasses, party hats - get the highest denoise, since adding new geometry is the biggest departure from the reference.
_additive_emoji_limitation: The cat-face emoji and other 'additive' expressions (😎 sunglasses, 🥳 party hat, 😇 halo, 😈 horns) are known to under-render on a photoreal human preset: even at denoise 0.90 the base identity prompt (e.g. 'portrait of a cheerful man...') keeps winning, so no cat ears/whiskers/shades actually appear. This isn't a denoise problem, it's the appended-fragment architecture fighting a base prompt that describes a specific kind of face. The fix isn't more denoise, it's giving these expressions their own reference image (e.g. an actual cat-eared version of the character) so the reference and the prompt agree on what's being rendered, instead of fighting each other from one shared human reference. Left in the vocabulary as-is because the mapping is correct and will render properly on presets set up that way, or once per-expression reference images are supported.

😊.label: smile
😊.positive: warm friendly smile, soft happy eyes

🙂.label: slight smile
🙂.positive: faint gentle closed-mouth smile, calm relaxed eyes

😃.label: grin
😃.positive: big cheerful grin, bright wide eyes

😀.label: grinning
😀.positive: wide cheerful open grin showing teeth, happy eyes

😁.label: beaming
😁.positive: beaming smile with clenched teeth showing, smiling eyes

😆.label: squint laugh
😆.positive: laughing hard, eyes squeezed shut, wide open grinning mouth

😂.label: laughing
😂.positive: laughing joyfully, eyes crinkled shut, open smile

🤣.label: rofl
🤣.positive: howling with laughter, eyes shut tight, mouth wide open, head tilted back

😅.label: nervous laugh
😅.positive: nervous awkward smile, a bead of sweat on the brow

😌.label: content
😌.positive: content peaceful expression, gentle closed-eye smile

😇.label: innocent
😇.positive: serene innocent smile, wide gentle eyes, a glowing halo above the head

🥰.label: loving
🥰.positive: warm loving affectionate smile, soft adoring half-closed eyes

😍.label: heart eyes
😍.positive: adoring blissful expression, sparkling wide eyes, big smitten smile

🤩.label: star-struck
🤩.positive: star-struck excited expression, sparkling shining wide eyes, big open smile

😎.label: cool
😎.positive: cool confident smile wearing dark sunglasses

🥳.label: partying
🥳.positive: celebratory party face, wearing a party hat, big grin, confetti

😉.label: wink

😘.negative: wide open mouth, both eyes open

😗.label: kissing
😗.positive: kissing face, puckered pursed lips, calm eyes

😋.label: yum
😋.positive: savoring delight, tongue licking the lips, happy closed eyes

😛.label: tongue out
😛.positive: playful face sticking the tongue out, cheeky

😜.label: wink tongue

🤪.label: zany
🤪.positive: wild zany expression, tongue out, eyes looking in different directions

😏.label: smirk
😏.positive: sly confident smirk, one eyebrow raised

😈.label: mischievous
😈.positive: mischievous devilish grin, sly narrowed eyes, small horns

🤓.label: nerdy
🤓.positive: nerdy expression with big round glasses, awkward toothy smile

😑.label: expressionless

🤨.label: skeptical
🤨.positive: skeptical doubtful expression, one eyebrow raised high

🙄.label: eye roll
🙄.positive: rolling the eyes upward, unimpressed, flat mouth

😒.label: unamused

😬.label: grimace
😬.positive: awkward grimace, clenched teeth bared, tense lips

🤔.label: thinking
🤔.positive: thoughtful pensive expression, slightly furrowed brow

😕.label: confused
😕.positive: confused puzzled expression, uneven brows, slight frown

😟.label: worried
😟.positive: worried concerned expression, raised inner brows, slight frown

😣.label: persevering
😣.positive: strained persevering expression, eyes scrunched, mouth tight

😖.label: confounded

😢.label: sad

😭.label: sobbing
